author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 4fd2ffc4. Added ferrotorch-jit::symbolic module with ShapeSignature (range-constrained symbolic dims), Guard (runtime validation), SymbolicTracedModule<T>, compile_symbolic(), and patch_reshape_for_symbolic_dims() which rewrites concrete reshape targets to -1 for symbolic positions. 14 new tests; 243 ferrotorch-jit tests pass.
